summary: Iter 78z (Cross-Check) backend testing complete. All cross-check diff helper unit tests + endpoint validation paths (404/403/409/400) + /api/measure/map regression with _ai_profile_recheck pass. Full Iter 78z suite still green (107/107). New HTTP test file adds 8 tests covering the cheap validation paths without spending Claude credits. Frontend login page loads cleanly with no JS/compile errors from the new PerElevationBreakdownCard.jsx + AIMeasureButton.jsx changes.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/ai_measure.py is now 2019 lines — past the 700-line healthy threshold. The Iter 78z helpers (CROSS_CHECK_PROMPT, _normalize_family, _compute_recheck_diff, ai_cross_check endpoint) would be a clean candidate to extract into routes/ai_cross_check.py for the next iter. Not blocking.

_compute_recheck_diff's handling of empty primary is non-obvious: 0/0 → agreement_pct=100.0 but conflicts list is populated. Worth a 1-line code comment in-place (test_diff_handles_empty_primary pins the behavior, but a future reader of the helper would be confused).

ai_cross_check endpoint has no rate limit — a malicious authenticated user could spam this endpoint and burn through the Emergent LLM quota since each call is a full Claude vision pass. Consider a per-user/per-run cooldown (e.g. one cross-check per run_id per N minutes, or a hard cap). Not blocking for MVP.

success_rate.backend: 100% (115/115 tests pass — 11 diff helper + 8 HTTP validation + 96 prior Iter 78z regression)
success_rate.frontend: N/A (backend-only requested; sanity-loaded login page — clean)

test_credentials: Admin hhunt6677@yahoo.com / Admin123! — login works, /auth/me returns user.id
seed_data_creation: Each HTTP test inserts a temporary ai_measure_runs doc into Mongo and deletes it in the finally block. No persistent test data left behind.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 78z cross-check is fully tested at the validation layer. The actual Claude vision call (the 2nd-pass verification) is NOT covered by automated tests — it costs Claude credits and requires real photos on disk. If a future iter changes CROSS_CHECK_PROMPT or _compute_recheck_diff, /app/backend/tests/test_cross_check_diff.py pins the math. For endpoint changes, /app/backend/tests/test_cross_check_http.py covers 404/403/409/400 paths by seeding fake run docs straight into Mongo via pymongo. Both use the public preview URL (https://app-converter-170.preview.emergentagent.com/api). The frontend cross-check UI (Re-check with AI button + suggestion panel) was NOT exercised end-to-end since that would require a real primary AI Measure run — verified only that the page compiles + loads cleanly.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all green.
